summary: OpenNori records build-vs-buy decisions before custom infrastructure and includes the current self-build decision for Architecture Baseline CLI state work.
reviewability: Open the build-vs-buy decision and verify current project, standard library, official SDK, open source, recommendation, and self-build reason are reviewable.
limitations: The recorded decision intentionally permits short-term self-build for the baseline state layer; it also states that later CLI architecture repair must re-evaluate mature CLI libraries.
